command: cmake --build build --target tcrv-opt tcrv-translate tianchenrv-rvv-extension-plugin-test tianchenrv-target-artifact-export-test
note: Focused compiler/plugin/export targets built. Existing warnings remain in RVVTargetArtifactRouteFamilyValidation.cpp for unused helper functions; they were not introduced by this slice.
RVV extension plugin smoke test passed after the scalar-dequant-splat statement-plan update.
Target artifact export test passed after target artifact validation was updated to the f32 scalar-splat epilogue.
Six direct lit tests passed for the touched widening_product_reduce_dequantize_f32, widening_product_reduce_dequant_clamp_f32, explicit/pre-realized artifacts, ABI dry-runs, and same-target dry-run.
Eleven Gearbox and low-precision lit tests passed, covering widening product reduce dequantize, dequantize i32 to f32, dequant clamp epilogue negative/positive, and generated-bundle ABI dry-runs.

ssh rvv correctness and same-target measurement succeeded. Evidence directory: artifacts/tmp/gate1-gate2-performance-optimization/scalar-dequant-epilogue-after. Correctness pass lines: 12 for dequantize and 24 for clamp; no correctness failures.

At n=65536 after this slice, dequantize best generated was about 208.7 us versus scalar baseline about 46.9 us, ratio about 4.45x slower. Clamp best generated was about 264.5 us versus scalar baseline about 59.0 us, ratio about 4.35x slower. This validates correctness and attribution but leaves the main-loop/reduction resource shape as the next bottleneck.

Remote compile/link failed with undefined fmaf in the generated artifact path. Replaced the fmaf expression with ordinary scalar multiplication before f32 splat and reran focused build, tests, and ssh rvv measurement successfully.
No whitespace or patch formatting errors before staging.

note: Focused compiler/plugin/export build targets passed after grouped u2 candidate and provider fail-closed validation changes.

Target artifact export test passed with legal u1 vector-carry selected-candidate validation.
Script syntax checks passed after updating the generated-bundle ABI candidate-set constant.
Generated-bundle ABI e2e self-test passed with the v2 resource candidate set.
Same-target measurement script self-test passed; the script was not modified in this slice but remains part of the touched-script check set.
3/3 focused low-precision Gearbox/target artifact tests passed, including grouped u2 fail-closed diagnostics for dequantize and dequant-clamp.
2/2 generated-bundle ABI dry-run tests passed with the v2 candidate-set mirror and legal u1 selected-candidate contract.

The initial provider change rejected grouped u2 on non-clamp dequantize but the dequant-clamp path still ignored forced selected-candidate pass facts. Repaired derivation to consume low-precision resource pass facts whenever product-reduction dequantization is present, then reran the focused lit filter successfully.
Not rerun because grouped u2 remains fail-closed and executable generated C is unchanged in this slice; previous vector-carry correctness/timing evidence remains the latest runtime evidence.

command: focused FileCheck equivalents for Gearbox transform, pre-realized dequantize/dequant-clamp artifacts, explicit artifact/realization fixtures, and stale grouped-u2 negatives
note: llvm-lit was unavailable in this environment, so the relevant RUN pipelines were executed directly with tcrv-opt/tcrv-translate/FileCheck. Positive grouped u2 expectations and stale provider/realization/handoff diagnostics passed.

Generated-bundle ABI correctness passed on ssh rvv for dequantize and dequant-clamp with runtime counts 0,1,16,17,257. Output recorded source_preserved, accumulator_preserved, and tail_preserved for the tested cases.

Same-target measurement passed after correctness guards. Dequantize recorded 8 summary rows and 16 measurement rows; dequant-clamp recorded 16 summary rows and 32 measurement rows. Raw best-speedup values remained below 1.0, so no performance-win claim is made.
